'''Gilthor Breen''' was a [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorran]] [[Gender/Legends|man]] and the public face of [[Lyster Innovations]], a company on [[Drewwa]].

==Biography==
The pale-skinned [[Gender/Legends|man]] met [[Ben Skywalker]] when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] came looking for the [[Amulet of Kalara]]. He was a fan of [[Aliniaca Verr]], who also happened to be from [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]. Ben was able to distract him with the thought of her or a lookalike long enough for the young man to sneak into the adjacent offices of [[Tendrando Arms]] to continue his [[Mission for the Amulet of Kalara|quest]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
